attacking_style: Attacks summits too early (1.5km out), lacking punch to finish when caught on descents. Shows misjudgment of time-to-line on short technical finales.
team_tactics: Primary role is tempo-setting domestique for Jumbo-Visma GC leaders, pacing on climbs to control race. Also deploys for marking dangerous GC rivals' bridge attempts.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes where positioning negates counterattacks. Struggles on steep gradients compared to other domestiques and loses advantage when attacks face downhill runs to finish.
vulnerability: Prone to crashes (3 documented incidents including high-speed descending). Initiates efforts too early, burning matches while bringing rivals into position. Shows doubt mid-attack when consulting power data.
key_patterns: Repeatedly crashes in high-speed technical sections, affecting Tour/Paris-Nice campaigns (3 instances)
Attacks summits prematurely at 1.5km, caught before finish when descent negates advantage (2 instances)
Immediately marks GC threats' bridge attempts, showing Jumbo's defensive awareness (2 instances)
Sets tempo on climbs for Jumbo-Visma leaders but finishes 1+ minute back on steep gradients
Poor cooperation in breakaways, arguing with companions allows others to escape (1 major instance)
Wastes energy positioning teammates, initiating kicks too early without contesting wins (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: Recent roles reduced to crash recovery pacing duties (Paris-Nice 2021), used completely with nothing left. No recent attacking shown.
